channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis outlines actionable AI governance framework
item.description: UK policy advisor Matt Clifford praised the essay's serious approach.
item.content:encoded:
UK policy advisor Matt Clifford praised the essay's serious approach.

Original source: https://foreignaffairs.com/world/artificial-intelligence-power-paradox

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/fakwzyvh

  • Views: 90,796
  • Likes: 612
  • Bookmarks: 235
  • Quotes: 8
  • Replies: 53
  • Posts: 20

Top authors

  • Sriram Krishnan
  • Mustafa Suleyman
  • Andreas Kirsch 🇺🇦
  • Pushmeet Kohli
  • Tom Brown

item.title: DeepMind's Demis Hassabis predicts AGI will arrive within a few years
item.description: He compares its impact to fire, warning of critical biosecurity risks.
item.content:encoded:
He compares its impact to fire, warning of critical biosecurity risks.

Original source: http://x.com/i/article/2076946210397552640

  • Views: 640,570
  • Likes: 5,172
  • Bookmarks: 5,793
  • Quotes: 340
  • Replies: 377
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • Demis Hassabis
  • scott belsky

item.title: X updates algorithm to boost mutual followers in replies
item.description: The update fixes missing mutual data that suppressed friends' content.
item.content:encoded:
The update fixes missing mutual data that suppressed friends' content.

Original source: https://x.com/nikitabier

item.title: OpenAI's roon and e/acc founder debate the movement's machine god philosophy
item.description: The debate sparked over treating AI as ordinary, manageable technology.
item.content:encoded:
The debate sparked over treating AI as ordinary, manageable technology.

Original source: https://www.normaltech.ai/p/ai-as-normal-technology

item.title: Gergely Orosz criticizes OpenAI for AI-generated documentation slop
item.description: A separate engineering team saved 60% of content by hand-writing docs.
item.content:encoded:
A separate engineering team saved 60% of content by hand-writing docs.

Original source: https://developers.openai.com/cookbook/examples/codex/using_goals_in_codex

  • Quotes: 19
  • Replies: 89

item.title: Anthropic's philosophical Claude video ad sparks debate on AI risk marketing
item.description: Critics argue using existential safety risks for promotion damages public trust.
item.content:encoded:
Critics argue using existential safety risks for promotion damages public trust.

item.title: David Manheim disputes framing of AI alignment progress
item.description: Filan disagreed with Manheim, asserting that models became more aligned.
item.content:encoded:
Filan disagreed with Manheim, asserting that models became more aligned.

item.title: Anthropic releases philosophical promotional video addressing public trust in Claude
item.description: The video directs viewers to a page discussing hard safety questions.

item.title: Will Brown warns N=1 reinforcement learning creates optimization exploits
item.description: Expanding batch size to compensate also reduces training data efficiency.
item.content:encoded:
Expanding batch size to compensate also reduces training data efficiency.

Original source: https://x.com/Grad62304977

item.title: Robert Scoble and Daniel Jeffries argue US chip sanctions on China backfired
item.description: The export restrictions forced China to build competing domestic technology stacks.
item.content:encoded:
The export restrictions forced China to build competing domestic technology stacks.

Original source: https://x.com/thePandaily
